title: Illustrative Examples of Algorithmic Game Theory Concepts
description: A flowchart showing how classic game theory problems connect to algorithmic solution concepts and their real-world applications.
relationships: Classic problem (Prisoner's Dilemma) illustrates Nash Equilibrium
Mechanism Design uses VCG to align incentives
PoA measures efficiency loss in systems without central control
Algorithmic Solutions are developed to compute equilibria and optimize outcomes
